description: Style NoteMinimalist styling peppered with innovative design details, we love wearable timepieces by QnQ! Styled to perfection, this watch is the perfect accessory staple you've been looking for. Liven up the summer with this watch from QnQ!Product DetailsCase style: Blue plastic round caseDial style: Blue dial with white hands and branding displayed on the dialStrap style: Blue plastic strap with a tang claspFeatures: Date aperture on the dial and screw to reset time  Waterproof to 5 BAR, allowing you to use it even when showeringWarranty: 1 yearSizeCase diameter: 38 mm Case thickness: 8 mm
